This newer model is listed with a $700 MSRP direct from Segway, however, you can more often find it down at $600 over at Amazon, with the Big Spring Sale pricing being retained here for added savings. While we have seen it go as low as $500 in the past, that rate hasn’t been seen since Black Friday, with the $70 markdown from its going rate (and $170 off the MSRP) being the next-best price to score it at. items.title: Stay in and curb spending with Chefman’s Everything Maker & Pizza Oven, now $40
items.summary:
Chefman Everything Maker & Pizza Oven

Buy for $40 (Reg. $50)

What we love

Going out for dinner can get pricey pretty quickly, so if you’re looking for a way to curb costs, this affordable appliance can certainly help. It features a countertop-friendly design that’s ready to cook everything from pizza to quesadillas, pancakes, and the list goes on. As part of its ongoing Spring sale, Dell is offering an Alienware 16X RTX 5060 gaming laptop for $1,949.99 shipped. This is one of the latest Alienware machines the brand introduced last year, and it continues to stand out as a flagship option with powerful hardware. The configuration featured here typically sells for $2,500, which means you’re saving $550 right now. While we’ve seen other versions of this laptop with less memory or storage drop to lower prices, this particular model, packed with 32GB of RAM and a 2TB SSD, has never seen a discount this steep. For comparison, Best Buy currently lists the 32GB/1TB variant at $2,050, making today’s deal an easy pick if you’re looking to upgrade your battlestation. Head below for more details.
